items.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
items.summary: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

items.title: The AI boom just found two new winners: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase
items.summary: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan showed that Wall Street is a major beneficiary of the AI boom, with record revenue driven by surging trading and investment banking.

items.title: Watch: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh testifies to House Financial Services committee
items.summary: In remarks prepared for the appearance, Warsh promised a vigilant fight to return inflation to the Fed's 2% target.

items.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
items.summary: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?

items.title: Chip stock sell-off, Netflix earnings, Trump's approval rating and more in Morning Squawk
items.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
